agents.task_title: Re-run verification matrix and update phase-5-verification-final.md
acceptance_criteria: Run ./gradlew chiseledBuild on all 5 MC versions and confirm BUILD SUCCESSFUL for each
Run ./gradlew chiseledTest on all 5 MC versions and confirm all JUnit tests pass, including the 7 AcquisitionCatalogTest tests
Run ./gradlew chiseledRunGametest on all 5 MC versions and confirm 16/16 gametests pass per version
Update the verification matrix in phase-5-verification-final.md with actual results (GREEN or FAIL per cell)
If all 5 versions are GREEN across all 3 columns: set Status to GREEN (do NOT apply git tag or push -- orchestrator policy)
If any version is RED: set Status to HOLD, leave tag unapplied, document the failure in the Known Issues section
